# daytona_runners_by_snapshot_ref (Data Source)

Lists Daytona runner snapshot mappings by snapshot ref through Daytona runner/proxy-authenticated routes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_runners_by_snapshot_ref" "example" {
  ref = "daytonaio/sandbox:0.6.0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ref` (String) Snapshot ref.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Runner snapshot mappings for the snapshot ref. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `runner_domain` (String) Runner domain, when available.
- `runner_id` (String) Runner ID.
- `runner_snapshot_id` (String) Runner snapshot ID.
